questions.q: How many surahs are in the standard Quran?
Which is the shortest surah in the Quran?
Which is the only surah that does NOT begin with the Bismillah?
Q 2:106 says Allah does what with verses he replaces?
Which surah is named after a non-prophet woman?
How many verses does the longest surah, Al-Baqarah, contain?
Which caliph is traditionally credited with standardising the Quranic text?
Al-Fatiha (Surah 1) is recited in every unit of prayer — how many verses does it contain?
Q 2:23 challenges those who doubt the Quran to produce what?
Q 4:3 permits a Muslim man to have at most how many wives simultaneously?
Q 2:255 (Ayat al-Kursi) states Allah is never overcome by what?
Q 4:34 uses the term 'qawwamun' to describe men's role — most commonly translated as what?
According to Bukhari, at what age was Aisha married to Muhammad?
And at what age was the marriage consummated, per the same hadith?
Aisha was permitted to keep playing with what in Muhammad's house?
Which of Muhammad's wives was originally married to his adopted son Zayd?
Which surah revealed verses permitting that adopted-son marriage?
The honey incident in Surah At-Tahrim (66) involved Muhammad and which wife?
Aisha said one verse let her conclude Allah hastened to do what?
Q 33:28 offered the Prophet's wives who chose the world — what would they receive?
Per Bukhari, how many wives did Muhammad have at the time of his nightly rounds?
Per Bukhari (h297), Aisha was lying under the same sheet as the Prophet while she was in what condition?
Q 33:4 clarifies that adopted sons are not real sons — partly to justify the Prophet marrying whose former wife?
The 'Ifk' incident — a false accusation of adultery against Aisha — was cleared by divine revelation in which surah?
Bukhari 3320: if a fly falls in your drink, what should you do?
questions.b: Dip the whole fly in, then drink

questions.q: Bukhari 5686: the Prophet recommended camel milk and which other camel product as medicine?
Per Bukhari, the Prophet said grey hair should be dyed — but NOT to resemble whom?
What is the prescribed sunnah position for drinking water?
Which side should one sleep on, according to the Prophet?
Per Muslim 2233, eating which animal was permitted by the Prophet for those who wished?
Bukhari describes Satan spending the night where, if you don't perform morning ablutions?
questions.b: In the upper part of your nose

questions.q: Per Bukhari, what does the crowing of a rooster at night indicate?
Bukhari records the Prophet had the physical strength of how many men, enabling him to visit all his wives in one night?
Bukhari records the Prophet was successfully bewitched by Labid bin al-A'sam — what was the effect?
questions.a: He forgot verses of the Quran
questions.b: He imagined doing things he had not actually done
questions.c: He lost his appetite for forty days

questions.q: Per Muslim, which of the following disrupts (cuts off) a man's prayer if it passes in front of him?
questions.c: A black dog, a donkey, or a woman

questions.q: Per Bukhari, when cleansing after using the toilet (istinja) with stones, the Prophet said their number must be what?
Q 18:86 says Dhul-Qarnayn followed the sun until he found it setting where?
questions.b: In a spring of murky water

questions.q: How many heavens does the Quran describe Allah as creating?
Per the Quran, what role do the mountains play on the earth?
According to Bukhari, the sun goes and prostrates where each evening?
Q 67:5 says the lower heaven is decorated with lamps that are also used as what?
Q 86:6-7 says man is created from a fluid issuing from where?
Q 65:12 — how many earths did Allah create, parallel to the heavens?
Q 21:30 says the heavens and earth were originally 'joined together' before Allah did what to them?
Q 22:5 describes which stage of human creation in the womb?
questions.b: Dust, then a drop, then a leech-like clot (alaqah)

questions.q: Q 23:14 names the embryonic stage that follows the alaqah (clot) as what?
Q 71:16 says Allah set the moon as a light — what did He make the sun?
Q 79:30 says Allah 'spread out' (dahaha) the earth after the heavens — some scholars cite this word to argue what about Earth's shape in the Quran?
questions.a: That the Quran teaches a flat earth
questions.b: That the Quran implies an egg-like (oblate) form
questions.c: That the earth is a perfect sphere

questions.q: After the siege of Banu Qurayza, what fate did the adult men face?
What share of war booty (ghanima) is allocated to Allah and the Messenger per Q 8:41?
Q 9:29 says jizya should be paid by People of the Book until they feel themselves what?
Which Jewish tribe was conquered at Khaybar?
questions.c: The Khaybar Jews (multiple clans incl. Banu Nadir remnants)

questions.q: Safiyya bint Huyayy was taken as a wife by Muhammad after which battle?
What is the Quranic term for striving in Allah's cause, often translated 'jihad'?
Q 9:5, the so-called 'Sword Verse', commands believers to do what to polytheists after the sacred months?
questions.b: Kill them wherever found, unless they repent

questions.q: Q 8:12 records Allah telling His angels He would cast what into the hearts of disbelievers?
Q 8:65 says one patient believer in battle can overcome how many disbelievers?
Q 47:4 commands believers when they meet disbelievers in battle to do what first?
questions.a: Call them to Islam three times

questions.q: Q 9:111 says Allah has 'purchased' the believers' lives and wealth in exchange for what?
Q 2:216 says fighting (qital) has been 'ordained' (kutiba) for believers even though it may be what to them?
Bukhari records the punishment for the married adulterer as what?
Q 24:2 prescribes how many lashes for the unmarried fornicator?
Q 5:38 prescribes what punishment for theft?
Bukhari records the Prophet's command on apostates as: 'Whoever changes his religion, ___'.
How many witnesses does Q 24:4 require to convict someone of zina (fornication)?
Q 24:4 — failing to produce those witnesses, the accuser receives how many lashes?
Abu Dawud 4395 records this as a hadd punishment exclusively for what?
Q 5:33 lists punishments for 'waging war against Allah and His Messenger' — which of these is explicitly included?
Q 4:15-16 prescribes an early Quranic punishment for women proven guilty of lewdness — what is it?
questions.b: Confinement in their houses until death or until Allah provides another way
questions.c: Banishment from the city for a year

questions.q: Q 4:89 says if hypocrites refuse to migrate and fight with the believers, what should be done with them?
questions.a: They should be shunned but not harmed
questions.b: They should be imprisoned and re-educated
questions.c: Take them and kill them wherever you find them

questions.q: Q 5:45 states that Allah prescribed which legal principle in the Torah?
questions.c: A life for a life, eye for eye, nose for nose

questions.q: Q 4:56 says those who reject faith will have their skin replaced in Hell — for what reason?
questions.a: To humiliate them before other sinners
questions.b: So they may taste the punishment again and again
questions.c: To make them unrecognisable to their families

questions.q: Q 33:50 grants Muhammad the right to take women in what additional category, beyond his wives?
questions.a: Captives whom his right hand possesses

questions.q: Q 33:53 forbids believers from doing what after his death?
How many simultaneous wives could Muhammad keep, per the standard Sunni accounting (vs. four for ordinary believers)?
What share of war booty was personally allocated to Muhammad as 'his portion'?
Q 33:56 commands believers to do what concerning Muhammad?
Tahajjud (the night vigil) was made obligatory on whom alone, per the standard ruling on Q 17:79?
Q 33:51 lets Muhammad do what with the rotation among his wives?
questions.a: Defer or take whichever he wishes

questions.q: Q 33:40 describes Muhammad as the 'Seal' (Khatam) of what?
Q 33:6 says the Prophet is closer to the believers than what?
Q 33:21 identifies the Prophet as a 'beautiful pattern of conduct' (uswa hasana) — for whom?
questions.b: For Arabs of the Quraysh tribe
questions.c: For those who hope in Allah and the Last Day

questions.q: Per Bukhari (h268), the Prophet had the physical strength of how many men, allowing him to visit all his wives in one night?
Q 4:65 says believers cannot truly have faith until they submit to the Prophet's judgment — and accept it without what?
Q 2:256 says 'no compulsion in religion' — but is widely held to be abrogated by which verse?
Q 4:82 claims the Quran contains how many discrepancies, if from Allah?
How long did Allah take to create the heavens and earth, per Q 7:54 / Q 41:9-12 (the famous tension)?
questions.c: Both answers appear in the text

questions.q: Q 19:67 says man was created from nothing. Q 19:11 (and 38:71) says Adam was created from what?
Q 96:2 says man was created from a clinging clot. Q 25:54 says from what?
Bukhari + Muslim record Muhammad's age at death as 63, but other reports give what?
Q 5:6 commands wudu before prayer. Q 4:43 forbids approaching prayer when in what state, before naming wudu?
Q 4:157 says the Jews did not crucify Jesus and did not kill him — what does the verse say happened instead?
questions.a: He ascended directly to heaven before they reached him
questions.b: It was made to appear that way to them (a likeness was shown)
questions.c: Another prophet died in his place voluntarily

questions.q: Q 4:171 describes Jesus as a Word from Allah and a Spirit from Him — yet it strongly forbids calling Allah what?
Q 3:59 says the likeness of Jesus with Allah is as the likeness of whom?
Q 5:3 declares 'this day I have perfected your religion' — scholars note this was revealed shortly before what event?
Bukhari (h3134) records the Prophet was successfully bewitched so that he imagined doing things he had not done. What does this tension most directly challenge?
questions.a: The reliability of the Quran's preservation
questions.b: The doctrine of prophetic immunity from magic
questions.c: The authority of the Sunnah over the Quran

levels.title: The deep cuts
levels.blurb: Satanic Verses, sheep-eats-Quran, lost surahs, Mi'raj.

questions.q: The 'Satanic Verses' incident concerns praise of which three goddesses being briefly recited?
Per Ibn Majah, after Muhammad's death, the verses on stoning and adult-suckling were lost because what happened?
questions.a: A sheep ate the page they were written on
questions.b: They were burned in a fire

questions.q: On the Mi'raj (night journey) the prayers were originally how many a day, before Moses negotiated them down?
After how many rounds of negotiation with Moses was the count finally fixed at 5?
On the Mi'raj, which prophet did Muhammad meet in the seventh heaven (Bukhari 3207)?
Aisha is reported (Muslim 1452) to have said the verse on adult breastfeeding (rida' al-kabir) made which relationships unmarriageable?
The Black Stone of the Kaaba (Tirmidhi 877) is said to have descended from Paradise originally what colour, before sins blackened it?
Per Muslim (h3477), a grown man named Salim was instructed to suckle from a woman's breast — what did this create?
questions.b: A foster-mother (mahram) relationship making him permanently unmarriageable to her
questions.c: A debt obligation to her husband

questions.q: Q 56:35-36 says the female companions of Paradise were 'created anew' — as what?
Q 78:33 describes one of the rewards of Paradise using the word 'kawa'ib' — typically translated as what?
Q 44:54 says the righteous in Paradise will be given as companions 'hur 'in' — this phrase typically means what?
Bukhari (h7231) gives an account of the Mi'raj night journey — where did it physically begin?
questions.b: The Sacred Mosque (al-Masjid al-Haram) in Mecca
